commit.subject: LU-17194 osc: remove io from cio_dio_submit
commit.message:
LU-17194 osc: remove io from cio_dio_submit

This is part of removing cl_io usage in the DIO submission
path.  The cl_io is no longer used here, so remove it.

However, the io_slice remains to be removed and may be
trickier;

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ic35c2d4f45493a81d2e9c966e00f5e2198cc25a0
